channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Illegal closure of footway from James Way to Hucclecote Road, 28th April
item.description:
The roadworks on Hucclecote Road have been in place for about two weeks now there is no sign of any statutory notice saying that the footway from James Way has been closed All for that matter the footway that has been obstructed by bollards. statutory undertakers should be made to follow the right rules before starting work and not casually ignore the law

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hucclecote Road, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Obstruction by unpermitted skip, scaffolding, building material on pavement

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 28th April
item.description:
Overgrown Hedge FW 3m x 1m Give and take TM With Temporary FW Closure Cut from around TS Box 126 Stats required (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This lamppost had not been maintained and the paint is coming off and the structure is starting to rust. It’s state and that of the lane invites antisocial behaviour. We have begun to clear the alley and tidy it up but cannot paint the lamppost- could you do this please., 28th April
item.description:
The lamppost is located on the public footpath between Parabola Road and Malvern Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parabola Road, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 28th April
item.description:
15MDB CWPH 800 X 500 X 52MM MARKED AS NUMBER 1 (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road surface around the speed bumps, 28th April
item.description:
The road surface around the speed bumps is in a terrible state of disrepair, especiallly the patch of road between the two humps. Please can it be addressed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brookfield Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tree harbouring rats and roots undermining wall foundations, 28th April
item.description:
Next to the arch entrance to Royal Parade Mews. The tree needs to be removed please - it's branches are causing dirt on our commercial building (Sovereign House), and the roots are harbouring rats (CBC knows about this problem and we are paying for pest control), and the roots are undermining our wall (Sovereign House) and the foundations of the arch which is precarious anyway since Highways removed the bolstering retaining wall. Can you get this actioned ASAP please. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bayshill Road, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
